documentation.description: Initialise global counters to zero on app creation.
Opt-in handler — registers the caller as a member.
Close-out handler — removes the caller from the registry.
Read the caller's membership info (joined round and balance snapshot).
documentation.returns: joined round, balance snapshot, current balance, and min balance

documentation.description: Check whether a member account meets the minimum balance requirement.
documentation.returns: true if the member's balance meets the minimum requirement
